step1Desc.default: We review your game and define the full scope — strings, languages, timeline, and budget.

step2Desc.default: File setup, glossary creation, style guide, and translator briefing.

step3Desc.default: Native-speaking gaming translators work through the content with full context.

step4Desc.default: In-game testing catches overflow, encoding, and context errors.

step5Desc.default: Clean files ready to drop into your pipeline. Post-launch support included.
